title: Vanish Plugin
description: Vanish Plugin is an advanced administration tool that allows staff members to become completely invisible and hidden
body:
This is an vanish plugin that allows you to completely disappear from the server, making other players believe that you are no longer online. It is perfect for silent moderation, catching griefers, and testing or training new moderators without influencing player behavior.

When vanish mode is enabled, you become an invisible observer, protected from damage and distractions, allowing you to monitor the server safely and efficiently.

## ⚙️ Main Features

- 🔒 Full Invisibility
Regular players cannot see you, and you are hidden from the online player list.

- 🕊️ Flight Enabled
Fly freely while in vanish mode, making it easier to observe players and explore the map.

- 🛡️ Invulnerability
You take no damage from any source, ensuring complete safety during moderation.

- 🧟 Mob Ignorance
Mobs will not target or attack you while vanished.

- 🎒 Item Pickup Disabled
Prevents accidentally picking up items and interfering with gameplay.

- 🌙 Night Vision Effect
A subtle visual effect to remind you that vanish mode is active, even in dark areas.

## 🧾 Commands

- /vanish or /v
Toggle vanish mode on or off.

## 🔐 Permissions

- vanish.use
Allows the player to use the vanish command (default: OP).

- vanish.others
Allows toggling vanish mode for other players.

- vanish.see
Allows seeing players who are currently in vanish mode.
